content: Great CLI tool READMEs follow a consistent structure: hero image/demo first (the hook), one-sentence description, requirements/prerequisites, one-command install with copy-pasteable snippet, usage examples with code blocks, configuration section (file location + example), all subcommands in a table, screenshots/screencasts showing key states, and license. Badges (build status, version, license) appear near the top but below the title. A collapsible 'Manual install' section keeps the happy path clean. Troubleshooting lives at the bottom or linked.
